name: nodeskclaw-file-reader
description: Agent tools for reading shared files and extracting text from PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, and XLSX documents.

skill.name: nodeskclaw-file-reader
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-file-reader
description: Tools to read office documents and PDFs from workspace shared files
always: true
---

You can extract readable text from workspace shared files via the deskclaw_file_reader.py script.

## Usage

```bash
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_file_reader.py read --file-id ID
```

## Supported Formats

- `pdf` -- Extract page text
- `doc` -- Extract Word 97-2003 text
- `docx` -- Extract Word document text and table rows
- `xls` -- Extract Excel 97-2003 sheet rows
- `xlsx` -- Extract Excel workbook sheet rows
- `txt/md/csv/json` -- Decode as plain text

## Image Files

- `png/jpg/jpeg/webp/gif` must be recognized by the model itself
- For image files, first get the file URL via `python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_shared_files.py get_file_url --file-id ID`
- Then let the model inspect the image directly; do not use OCR scripts

## Usage Rules

- Use `nodeskclaw-shared-files` to browse files and obtain the correct `file_id`
- Prefer this tool when the file is document-like and you need text extraction
- Large files are automatically truncated; if necessary, rerun with a larger `--max-chars`

## Examples

```bash
# Read a PDF
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_file_reader.py read --file-id <id>

# Read a spreadsheet with larger limits
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_file_reader.py read --file-id <id> --sheet-limit 8 --row-limit 400 --max-chars 20000
```
